content.title: Design, Source, and Sell Your Collections Seamlessly.
content.subtitle: JY empowers forward-thinking designers to create unique patterns, manage artisan partners, and sell directly to customers—without leaving the platform

trialoffer.keyline: Ready to start your own fashion line or work for one your terms

title_i18n.it-IT: Progetta, Approvvigiona e Vendi le Tue Collezioni Facilmente.
title_i18n.lv-LV: Veidojiet, iegādājieties un pārdodiet savas kolekcijas vienkārši.

subtitle_i18n.it-IT: JYT potenzia i designer visionari per creare modelli unici, gestire partner artigiani e vendere direttamente ai clienti senza lasciare la piattaforma.
subtitle_i18n.lv-LV: JYT sniedz iespēju vīzijas pilniem dizaineriem radīt unikātus modeļus, pārvaldīt amatnieku partnerus un pārdot tieši klientiem, neatstājot platformu.

cta.content: Ready to dive in?Start your free trial today.
cta.actionline: Get the cheat codes for selling and unlock your design potential.

content.title: A Snapshot of Your Design Pipeline

title_i18n.it-IT: Una Panoramica della Tua Pipeline di Design

cards.title: Design anything to everything
cards.description: Explore limitless design possibilities with medu that generates unique, market-ready textile patterns based on your custom parameters and trend analysis on a moodboard

cards.title: Never stay out of inventory
cards.description: Ensure complete transparency and traceability for your raw materials orders or samples from our trusted partners at anytime and keep your production on time.

cards.title: Your relationships in single place
cards.description: Manage your personal relationships and assign them work effortlessly from your design section. After all, relationships are the key to achieving your next best design.

cards.title: Traceable Design
cards.description: Never forget where you are and which part of the design you have completed, which is still pending, or which part your partners are working on. Keep a tab on everything.

content.title: From design to commerce
content.subtitle: Design, Produce and Celebrate  its that simple

subtitle_i18n.it-IT: Progetta, Produci e Celebra — è così semplice
subtitle_i18n.lv-LV: Veidojiet, Ražojiet un Sviniet — tik vienkārši

cards.title: Your Store, Your Choice
cards.description: Customize every aspect of your store with our integrated platform - from locations and payment providers to product tags and selling rules. Sell exactly how you want with tools that adapt to your business.

cards.title: Designs Into Products
cards.description: Transform your creative designs into sellable products seamlessly. Our integrated stack handles everything from pre-production to fulfillment, letting you focus on creating while we handle the commerce.

cards.title: Your Social Media, Automated
cards.description: Sell naturally across all social platforms without changing your workflow. Our integrated system connects your social presence to inventory, fulfillment, and customer management - so you can sell as you already engage.

content.title: Sell As You Already Are
content.subtitle: The Integrated Commerce Stack That Works Your Way

subtitle_i18n.it-IT: Lo Stack di E-Commerce Integrato Che Funziona a Modo Tuo
subtitle_i18n.lv-LV: Integrētais E-Komercijas Staks, Kas Strādā Jūsu Veidā

callToAction.text: Real production teams running on the same rails. See how your atelier can plug in.
